notes: Anonymous dimension block *D375: extension lines 8E44/8E45 span 325 units, MTEXT 8E49 reads 325 -- matches exactly; standard AutoCAD dimension cache, not a wall.

The bbox width computed from the LINE endpoints (55728.83-55403.83=325.0) exactly equals the MTEXT numeric value 325, and 3 DEFPOINTS points (8E4A-8E4C) plus the DIM-layer split (6 DIM + 3 DEFPOINTS = 9) match AutoCAD's fixed associative-dimension entity template.
rationale.rule: An anonymous block named *D### with entity histogram INSERT=2/LINE=3/MTEXT=1/POINT=3 split across DEFPOINTS+DIM layers, DIMDOT arrow inserts, and an MTEXT whose numeric value equals the LINE-derived bbox span is an AutoCAD-generated dimension cache regardless of drawing domain.
rationale.counterfactual: If the MTEXT value did not equal the extension-line span, or if any LINE sat on an architectural/wall layer instead of DIM, the dimension-cache read would weaken toward a wall or annotation-symbol classification.
rationale.uncertainty: The projection does not show what real-world feature (wall, opening, fixture) this 325-unit span measures, since no host-drawing INSERT placement or neighboring wall geometry is included in this block-definition-only view.
